zh.lifeSummary: 當Valentin Beyer於1543年出生在德國薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩時，他的父親Nicolaus Beyer25歲，母親Magdàlena Sueri22歲。他於1568年與Sabina Margaretha Meissner在德國薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1599年12月30日在他的家鄉享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Valentin Beyer于1543年出生在德国薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩时，他的父亲Nicolaus Beyer25岁，母亲Magdàlena Sueri22岁。他于1568年与Sabina Margaretha Meissner在德国薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1599年12月30日在他的家乡享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Beyer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Erwin, Ewald, Klaus, Alois, Arno, Gerhard, Gunter, Heinz, Theodor.
German, Scandinavian, English, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Bayer  . This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Poland.
Dutch: variant of Beijer, a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Beger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Manfred.
from an agent derivative of Middle High German bāgen ‘to quarrel, to pride oneself’, hence a nickname for a quarrelsome or boastful person.

variants.name: Beyers
meanings: Dutch: variant of Beijers, a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Bayer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Kurt, Otto, Klaus, Manfred, Bernd, Bernhard, Erwin, Franz, Hans, Johann, Juergen.

German, Scandinavian, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Bavaria (German Bayern). This region of southern Germany derives its name from that of the Celtic tribe of the Boii who once inhabited this area. They were displaced in the 6th century AD by an ancient Germanic people, the Boioarii or Baiuarii, whose name is derived from that of their Celtic predecessors. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, Czechia, Slovakia, and Poland. Compare Beyer and Payer .

English (Lincolnshire): occupational name for a maker of baize cloth, from an agent derivative of Old French baies, Middle English bayes (from the adjective bai ‘reddish-brown, bay’), probably so called because of its original color. This material was said to have been introduced into Britain by immigrants from France and the Netherlands in the 16th century, but the word certainly appears much earlier in English. The surname may also be topographic denoting a ‘dweller by the bend’, from an agent derivative of Old English bēag ‘bend’.

nameMeanings.name: Valentin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Danish vernacular form of Latin Valentinus. See Valentine .

en.lifeSummary: When Valentin Beyer was born in 1543, in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Saxony, Germany, his father, Nicolaus Beyer, was 25 and his mother, Magdàlena Sueri, was 22. He married Sabina Margaretha Meissner in 1568, in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 30 December 1599, in his hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Valentin Beyer est né en 1543, à Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Nicolaus Beyer, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Magdàlena Sueri, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Sabina Margaretha Meissner en 1568, à Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 30 décembre 1599, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Valentin Beyer 1543 in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicolaus Beyer 25 und seine Mutter Magdàlena Sueri 22. Er hat 1568 in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Deutschland Sabina Margaretha Meissner geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 30. Dezember 1599 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Valentin Beyer è nato il nel 1543 nel Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Germania, il suo padre, Nicolaus Beyer, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Magdàlena Sueri, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Sabina Margaretha Meissner nel 1568, nel Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 30 dicembre 1599, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Valentin Beyerが1543年にドイツサチセンクレイス アナバーグウィエサで生まれた時，父Nicolaus Beyerは25歳，母Magdàlena Sueriは22歳であった。1568年にドイツサチセンクレイス アナバーグウィエサでSabina Margaretha Meissnerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1599年12月30日に故郷で56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Valentin Beyer(이)가 1543년 독일 작센 크레이스 애나버그 위사에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicolaus Beyer(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Magdàlena Sueri(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1568년 독일 작센 크레이스 애나버그 위사에서 Sabina Margaretha Meissner(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1599년 12월 30일 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Valentin Beyer nasceu em 1543, em Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Nicolaus Beyer, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Magdàlena Sueri, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Sabina Margaretha Meissner em 1568, em Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de dezembro de 1599, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Valentin Beyer родился в 1543 г. в местности виеса, крис аннабирг, сачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Nicolaus Beyer было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Magdàlena Sueri, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Sabina Margaretha Meissner в 1568 г. в местности виеса, крис аннабирг, сачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 30 декабря 1599 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Valentin Beyer nació en 1543, en Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Nicolaus Beyer, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Magdàlena Sueri, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sabina Margaretha Meissner en 1568, en Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 30 de diciembre de 1599, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años.
